target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Laos DOSM conformity requirements, MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) and EDL (Électricité du Laos) grid-connection technical approval gates, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and the BRI-context note that Chinese-brand equipment is already widely deployed yet DOSM conformity and MEM/EDL technical approval remain the formal gates — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与老挝DOSM合格评定要求、能源矿产部（MEM）及老挝国家电力公司（EDL）并网技术审批门槛、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数，以及"一带一路"背景说明（中国品牌设备已广泛部署，但DOSM合格评定和MEM/EDL技术审批仍是正式门槛）——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與寮國DOSM合格評定要求、能源礦產部（MEM）及寮國國家電力公司（EDL）併網技術審批門檻、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數，以及「一帶一路」背景說明（中國品牌設備已廣泛部署，但DOSM合格評定和MEM/EDL技術審批仍是正式門檻）——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DOSM conformity scope determination, MEM project-approval decision, EDL grid-connection acceptance, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Laos DOSM technical regulations, MEM renewable-energy licensing requirements, EDL-T transmission interconnection conditions, and project-owner procurement requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Laos regulatory capacity is developing; requirements may differ by project type (mini-grid, distributed, utility-scale), BRI financing context, and procurement authority.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DOSM合格评定范围裁定、能源矿产部项目批准决定、EDL并网接受、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行老挝DOSM技术法规、能源矿产部可再生能源许可要求、EDL-T输电互联条件及项目业主采购要求。老挝监管能力仍在发展中；要求可能因项目类型（微电网、分布式、公用事业规模）、"一带一路"融资背景及采购机构而有所不同。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DOSM合格評定範圍裁定、能源礦產部項目批准決定、EDL併網接受、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行寮國DOSM技術法規、能源礦產部可再生能源許可要求、EDL-T輸電互聯條件及項目業主採購要求。寮國監管能力仍在發展中；要求可能因項目類型（微電網、分散式、公用事業規模）、「一帶一路」融資背景及採購機構而有所不同。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Laos, the key practical gaps are: (1) DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) conformity assessment — Laos adopts IEC-based standards and requires product conformity; (2) MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) project licensing and technical approval for grid-connected solar installations; (3) EDL (Électricité du Laos) / EDL-T grid-connection technical acceptance, which references IEC standards including IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 62109-1/-2 safety; (4) firmware and protection settings validated for Laos's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid baseline; and (5) EMC evidence under IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Critically, although Chinese-brand inverters are widely deployed in Laos under BRI-linked projects, market prevalence does not substitute for formal DOSM conformity and MEM/EDL technical approval. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 documents do not automatically satisfy these Laos requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口老挝时，主要实际差距包括：（1）DOSM（标准计量局）合格评定——老挝采用基于IEC的标准，要求产品合格；（2）能源矿产部（MEM）并网太阳能装置的项目许可和技术审批；（3）老挝国家电力公司（EDL）/EDL-T并网技术接受，引用IEC标准，包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 62109-1/-2安全；（4）针对老挝230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件和保护设置，而非中国220/380 V电网基准；（5）依据IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的EMC证据。关键在于，尽管中国品牌逆变器已通过"一带一路"相关项目在老挝广泛部署，市场普及不能替代正式DOSM合格评定和MEM/EDL技术审批。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964文件不自动满足上述老挝要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口寮國時，主要實際差距包括：（1）DOSM（標準計量局）合格評定——寮國採用基於IEC的標準，要求產品合格；（2）能源礦產部（MEM）併網太陽能裝置的項目許可和技術審批；（3）寮國國家電力公司（EDL）/EDL-T併網技術接受，引用IEC標準，包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 62109-1/-2安全；（4）針對寮國230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體和保護設置，而非中國220/380 V電網基準；（5）依據IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的EMC證據。關鍵在於，儘管中國品牌逆變器已透過「一帶一路」相關項目在寮國廣泛部署，市場普及不能替代正式DOSM合格評定和MEM/EDL技術審批。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964文件不自動滿足上述寮國要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
